name: Deduction for Long-Term Care Premiums

eligibility.description: Premiums are deductible subject to age-based limits and the 7.5% AGI floor for itemized medical deductions.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Premiums paid for a qualified long-term care insurance contract are treated as deductible medical expenses under section 213(d).
